docs.creator: Gavin Ryan.
docs.description: Australia Post Alphabet Stamp Series A-Z. Artist Gavin Ryan. Australia Post Group Group Chief Executive Officer & Managing Director : Mr. Paul Graham, 480 Swan St Richmond VIC 3121. A is for … Aussie rules, Adelaide, ant, Anzac memorial ... B is for … Budgie-smugglers, blowflies, barramundi, billy and …. C is for… Canberra, cockatoo, crocodile, campfire, couple… D is for… a digger, his dingo ... E is for … Emo emu, ear-bashing, echidna and ... F is for … a footy fan, fishing ... G is for … Galah, sumboots, gecko, gasket and ... H is for … hanging washing on the Hills hoist ... I is for … an ironing ironman! ... J is for … Jillaroo, Jam, jumbuck and ... K is for … Koala, kangaroo suit, kelpie and... L is for … Lace Monitor, lyrebird, lamington, log, lounge … M is for … mullet, mud crab, macadamia, meat pie ... N is for… New South Wales, nipper, numbat… O is for … Oilskin, opal, opera house, Oar and ... P is for … Platypus, possum and paviova ... Q is for… Queensland, Quokka, queue, quoll… R is for… refrigerator, rugby, reel, rope, Red Centre, ruler… S is for… South Australia, shark, sandcastle, surf, starfish, sausage… T is for…Tasmania, tinnie, tradie, Tasmanian Devil, two-up … U is for … Ulysses butterfly, uggs, umpire and ... V is for… Victoria, Victa, vegemite, vegetables, violin… W is for… Western Australia, wombat, wattle, waratah, water hose… X is for … X-ray, Xanthorrhea grass tree, xylophone and ... Y is for … Yowie. Yabbie, Yarra River and ... Z is for … Zebra Finch, zoologist, zebra crossing and ... “Overview On 16 August 2016, part two of the Fair Dinkum Aussie Alphabet stamp series will be released. Once again, Artist Gavin Ryan has created some highly amusing and quintessentially ocker scenes, based on each letter of the alphabet. Within each stamp-sized scene, there are places, products, lexicon, cultural icons and native fauna beginning with the featured letter. Part One, released on 1 March 2016 featured the letters N, Q, S, V and W (to represent five of the six Australian states). This time it’s A, C, L, R, T. That means it’s Tassie’s turn! As well as Tarquin the tradie, you’ll cross paths with angry Aaron the Aussie Rules aficionado, and cautious couple Cheryl and Claude. Plus, there’s a lamington being lobbed, a crazy cockatoo and a chummy crocodile to contend with.” Compiled by Graham Millar. Source .
docs.title: Australia Post Alphabet Stamp Series A Z
